[[sn:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] [[zh:三月初七]] [[en:draft:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Tenmu]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[674]] [[April 17]] ） - [[対馬国|対馬]] の[[国司]] が、日本で初めて産出された銀を朝廷に献上 * [[Einin]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1293]] [[April 14]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が、[[蒙古]] 再来に備え九州の裁判と軍事指揮を行う[[鎮西探題]] を[[博多]] に設置 * [[Shōkyō]] 1st year/[[元弘]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1332]] [[April 2]] ） - 鎌倉幕府が、[[元弘の乱]] で挙兵した[[後醍醐天皇]] の[[Oki Province |隠岐]] への流罪を決定 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎（後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] ）が北条氏の[[小田原城]] を包囲するが攻め落とせず撤退 * [[Bunka]] 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1805]] [[April 6]] ） - 長崎に来航中のロシア使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ]] に通商拒絶を通告
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[April 28]] ） - [[徳川頼宣]] 、初代[[紀州藩]] 主・[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の十男（+ [[1671]] ） * [[Keichō]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1608]] [[April 21]] ） - [[中江藤樹]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} ・日本[[陽明学]] 派の祖（+ [[1648]] ） * [[Bunka]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1812]] [[April 18]] ） - [[白石正一郎]] 、[[商人]] （+ [[1880]] ） * 文化10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[April 7]] ） - [[真木保臣]] 、[[久留米藩]] 士・[[志士]] （+ [[1864]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1835]] [[April 4]] ） - [[壬生基修]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Empress Suiko]] 36th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[628]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Empress Suiko]] 、33代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[554]] ）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] [[zh:三月初七]] [[en:draft:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Tenmu]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[674]] [[April 17]] ） - [[対馬国|対馬]] の[[国司]] が、日本で初めて産出された銀を朝廷に献上 * [[Einin]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1293]] [[April 14]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が、[[蒙古]] 再来に備え九州の裁判と軍事指揮を行う[[鎮西探題]] を[[博多]] に設置 * [[Shōkyō]] 1st year/[[元弘]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1332]] [[April 2]] ） - 鎌倉幕府が、[[元弘の乱]] で挙兵した[[後醍醐天皇]] の[[Oki Province |隠岐]] への流罪を決定 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎（後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] ）が北条氏の[[小田原城]] を包囲するが攻め落とせず撤退 * [[Bunka]] 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1805]] [[April 6]] ） - 長崎に来航中のロシア使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ]] に通商拒絶を通告
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[April 28]] ） - [[徳川頼宣]] 、初代[[紀州藩]] 主・[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の十男（+ [[1671]] ） * [[Keichō]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1608]] [[April 21]] ） - [[中江藤樹]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} ・日本[[陽明学]] 派の祖（+ [[1648]] ） * [[Bunka]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1812]] [[April 18]] ） - [[白石正一郎]] 、[[Merchant]] （+ [[1880]] ） * 文化10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[April 7]] ） - [[真木保臣]] 、[[久留米藩]] 士・[[志士]] （+ [[1864]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1835]] [[April 4]] ） - [[壬生基修]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Empress Suiko]] 36th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[628]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Empress Suiko]] 、33代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[554]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|6|3|8|2|7|4|3|0307}}

[[sn:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] [[zh:三月初七]] [[en:draft:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Tenmu]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[674]] [[April 17]] ） - [[対馬国|対馬]] の[[国司]] が、日本で初めて産出された銀を朝廷に献上 * [[Einin]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1293]] [[April 14]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が、[[蒙古]] 再来に備え九州の裁判と軍事指揮を行う[[鎮西探題]] を[[博多]] に設置 * [[Shōkyō]] 1st year/[[元弘]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1332]] [[April 2]] ） - 鎌倉幕府が、[[元弘の乱]] で挙兵した[[後醍醐天皇]] の[[Oki Province |隠岐]] への流罪を決定 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎（後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] ）が北条氏の[[小田原城]] を包囲するが攻め落とせず撤退 * [[Bunka]] 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1805]] [[April 6]] ） - 長崎に来航中のロシア使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ]] に通商拒絶を通告
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[April 28]] ） - [[徳川頼宣]] 、初代[[紀州藩]] 主・[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の十男（+ [[1671]] ） * [[Keichō]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1608]] [[April 21]] ） - [[中江藤樹]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} ・日本[[陽明学]] 派の祖（+ [[1648]] ） * [[Bunka]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1812]] [[April 18]] ） - [[白石正一郎]] 、[[Merchant]] （+ [[1880]] ） * 文化10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[April 7]] ） - [[真木保臣]] 、[[久留米藩]] 士・[[志士]] （+ [[1864]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1835]] [[April 4]] ） - [[壬生基修]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Empress Suiko]] 36th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[628]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Empress Suiko]] 、33代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[554]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] [[zh:三月初七]] [[en:draft:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Tenmu]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[674]] [[April 17]] ） - [[対馬国|対馬]] の[[国司]] が、日本で初めて産出された銀を朝廷に献上 * [[Einin]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1293]] [[April 14]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が、[[蒙古]] 再来に備え九州の裁判と軍事指揮を行う[[鎮西探題]] を[[博多]] に設置 * [[Shōkyō]] 1st year/[[元弘]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1332]] [[April 2]] ） - 鎌倉幕府が、[[元弘の乱]] で挙兵した[[後醍醐天皇]] の[[Oki Province |隠岐]] への流罪を決定 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎（後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] ）が北条氏の[[小田原城]] を包囲するが攻め落とせず撤退 * [[Bunka]] 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1805]] [[April 6]] ） - 長崎に来航中のロシア使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ]] に通商拒絶を通告
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[April 28]] ） - [[徳川頼宣]] 、初代[[紀州藩]] 主・[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の十男（+ [[1671]] ） * [[Keichō]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1608]] [[April 21]] ） - [[中江藤樹]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} ・日本[[陽明学]] 派の祖（+ [[1648]] ） * [[Bunka]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1812]] [[April 18]] ） - [[白石正一郎]] 、[[Merchant]] （+ [[1880]] ） * 文化10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[April 7]] ） - [[真木保臣]] 、[[久留米藩]] 士・[[志士]] （+ [[1864]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1835]] [[April 4]] ） - [[壬生基修]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Empress Suiko]] 36th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[628]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Empress Suiko]] 、33代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[554]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|6|3|8|2|7|4|3|0307}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] [[zh:三月初七]] [[en:draft:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Tenmu]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[674]] [[April 17]] ） - [[対馬国|対馬]] の[[国司]] が、日本で初めて産出された銀を朝廷に献上 * [[Einin]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1293]] [[April 14]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が、[[蒙古]] 再来に備え九州の裁判と軍事指揮を行う[[鎮西探題]] を[[博多]] に設置 * [[Shōkyō]] 1st year/[[元弘]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1332]] [[April 2]] ） - 鎌倉幕府が、[[元弘の乱]] で挙兵した[[後醍醐天皇]] の[[Oki Province |隠岐]] への流罪を決定 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎（後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] ）が北条氏の[[小田原城]] を包囲するが攻め落とせず撤退 * [[Bunka]] 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1805]] [[April 6]] ） - 長崎に来航中のロシア使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ]] に通商拒絶を通告
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[April 28]] ） - [[徳川頼宣]] 、初代[[紀州藩]] 主・[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の十男（+ [[1671]] ） * [[Keichō]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1608]] [[April 21]] ） - [[中江藤樹]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} ・日本[[陽明学]] 派の祖（+ [[1648]] ） * [[Bunka]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1812]] [[April 18]] ） - [[白石正一郎]] 、[[Merchant]] （+ [[1880]] ） * 文化10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[April 7]] ） - [[真木保臣]] 、[[久留米藩]] 士・[[志士]] （+ [[1864]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1835]] [[April 4]] ） - [[壬生基修]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Empress Suiko]] 36th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[628]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Empress Suiko]] 、33代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[554]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|6|3|8|2|7|4|3|0307}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Emperor Tenmu]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[674]] [[April 17]] ） - [[対馬国|対馬]] の[[国司]] が、日本で初めて産出された銀を朝廷に献上 * [[Einin]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1293]] [[April 14]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が、[[蒙古]] 再来に備え九州の裁判と軍事指揮を行う[[鎮西探題]] を[[博多]] に設置 * [[Shōkyō]] 1st year/[[元弘]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1332]] [[April 2]] ） - 鎌倉幕府が、[[元弘の乱]] で挙兵した[[後醍醐天皇]] の[[Oki Province |隠岐]] への流罪を決定 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎（後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] ）が北条氏の[[小田原城]] を包囲するが攻め落とせず撤退 * [[Bunka]] 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1805]] [[April 6]] ） - 長崎に来航中のロシア使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ]] に通商拒絶を通告

== Events == * [[Emperor Tenmu]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[674]] [[April 17]] ） - [[対馬国|対馬]] の[[国司]] が、日本で初めて産出された銀を朝廷に献上 * [[Einin]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1293]] [[April 14]] ） - [[Kamakura shogunate]] が、[[蒙古]] 再来に備え九州の裁判と軍事指揮を行う[[鎮西探題]] を[[博多]] に設置 * [[Shōkyō]] 1st year/[[元弘]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1332]] [[April 2]] ） - 鎌倉幕府が、[[元弘の乱]] で挙兵した[[後醍醐天皇]] の[[Oki Province |隠岐]] への流罪を決定 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year（[[1561]] _月_日） - 長尾景虎（後の[[Uesugi Kenshin]] ）が北条氏の[[小田原城]] を包囲するが攻め落とせず撤退 * [[Bunka]] 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1805]] [[April 6]] ） - 長崎に来航中のロシア使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ]] に通商拒絶を通告
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[April 28]] ） - [[徳川頼宣]] 、初代[[紀州藩]] 主・[[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] の十男（+ [[1671]] ） * [[Keichō]] 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1608]] [[April 21]] ） - [[中江藤樹]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} ・日本[[陽明学]] 派の祖（+ [[1648]] ） * [[Bunka]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1812]] [[April 18]] ） - [[白石正一郎]] 、[[Merchant]] （+ [[1880]] ） * 文化10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1813]] [[April 7]] ） - [[真木保臣]] 、[[久留米藩]] 士・[[志士]] （+ [[1864]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1835]] [[April 4]] ） - [[壬生基修]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Empress Suiko]] 36th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[628]] [[April 15]] ） - [[Empress Suiko]] 、33代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[554]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|6|3|8|2|7|4|3|0307}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}}) caused the fall of {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家}}’s forces by capturing the castle at {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日}}) – {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約}} (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the {{ill|Akahōtai|ja|赤報隊}}, as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇}}, the 93rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1860, {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1868, {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三}}, a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝}}. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}}) caused the fall of {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家}}’s forces by capturing the castle at {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日}}) – {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約}} (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the {{ill|Akahōtai|ja|赤報隊}}, as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇}}, the 93rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1860, {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1868, {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三}}, a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝}}. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.

== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]]

{{draft categories| [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:March 7 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:q]] [[Category:Lunisolar March]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[ja:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初七]] [[en:draft:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 7 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}}) caused the fall of {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家}}’s forces by capturing the castle at {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日}}) – {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約}} (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the {{ill|Akahōtai|ja|赤報隊}}, as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇}}, the 93rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1860, {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1868, {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三}}, a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝}}. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇}}, the 93rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1860, {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1868, {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三}}, a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝}}. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860, {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868, {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝|12=draft}}. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=draft}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}) caused the fall of {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家|12=draft}}’s forces by capturing the castle at {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)|12=draft}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋|12=draft}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府|12=draft}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約|12=draft}} (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}} was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the {{ill|Akahōtai|ja|赤報隊|12=draft}}, as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇|12=draft}}, the 93rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft}} (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶|12=draft}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝|12=draft}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|12=draft}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian [[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=draft}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}) caused the fall of {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家|12=draft}}’s forces by capturing the castle at {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)|12=draft}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋|12=draft}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府|12=draft}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約|12=draft}} (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}} was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the {{ill|Akahōtai|ja|赤報隊|12=draft}}, as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇|12=draft}}, the 93rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft}} (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶|12=draft}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝|12=draft}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|12=draft}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=draft}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助|12=draft}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子|12=draft}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|12=draft}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=draft}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山|12=draft}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860, {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868, {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝|12=draft}}. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:q]] [[Category:Lunisolar March]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 7일]] [[ja:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初七]] [[en:draft:March 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:3月7日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 7 (Lunisolar)]]

artist (died [[1963]]).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=draft}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}) caused the fall of {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家|12=draft}}’s forces by capturing the castle at {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)|12=draft}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋|12=draft}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府|12=draft}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約|12=draft}} (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}} was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the {{ill|Akahōtai|ja|赤報隊|12=draft}}, as pseudo-officials.

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初七]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=draft}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}) caused the fall of {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家|12=draft}}’s forces by capturing the castle at {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)|12=draft}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋|12=draft}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府|12=draft}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約|12=draft}} (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}} was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the {{ill|Akahōtai|ja|赤報隊|12=draft}}, as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇|12=draft}}, the 93rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft}} (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶|12=draft}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝|12=draft}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|12=draft}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=draft}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助|12=draft}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子|12=draft}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|12=draft}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=draft}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山|12=draft}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860, {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868, {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝|12=draft}}. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月7日'''（きゅうれきさんがつなのか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[天武天皇]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[674年]][[4月17日]]） - [[対馬国|対馬]]の[[国司]]が、日本で初めて産出された銀を朝廷に献上 * [[永仁]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1293年]][[4月14日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が、[[蒙古]]再来に備え九州の裁判と軍事指揮を行う[[鎮西探題]]を[[博多]]に設置 * [[正慶]]元年/[[元弘]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1332年]][[4月2日]]） - 鎌倉幕府が、[[元弘の乱]]で挙兵した[[後醍醐天皇]]の[[隠岐国|隠岐]]への流罪を決定 * [[永禄]]4年（[[1561年]]_月_日<!--3月22日,(閏3月)4月21日-->） - 長尾景虎（後の[[上杉謙信]]）が北条氏の[[小田原城]]を包囲するが攻め落とせず撤退 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1805年]][[4月6日]]） - 長崎に来航中のロシア使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ]]に通商拒絶を通告
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1602年]][[4月28日]]） - [[徳川頼宣]]、初代[[紀州藩]]主・[[徳川家康]]の十男（+ [[1671年]]） * [[慶長]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1608年]][[4月21日]]） - [[中江藤樹]]、[[儒学者]]・日本[[陽明学]]派の祖（+ [[1648年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1812年]][[4月18日]]） - [[白石正一郎]]、[[商人]]（+ [[1880年]]） * 文化10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1813年]][[4月7日]]） - [[真木保臣]]、[[久留米藩]]士・[[志士]]（+ [[1864年]]） * [[天保]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1835年]][[4月4日]]） - [[壬生基修]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1906年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[推古天皇]]36年（ユリウス暦[[628年]][[4月15日]]） - [[推古天皇]]、33代[[天皇]]（* [[554年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|6|3|8|2|7|4|3|0307}}

== 忌日 == * [[推古天皇]]36年（ユリウス暦[[628年]][[4月15日]]） - [[推古天皇]]、33代[[天皇]]（* [[554年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839096]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 7|qq=March 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) caused the fall of [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by capturing the castle at [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the office of [[:en:Kanjō bugyō|Kanjō Bugyō]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the [[:en:Sekihōtai|Akahōtai]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[:en:Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1288|1288]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Fushimi|Later Fushimi Tennō]], the 93rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1336|1336]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – [[:en:Tsutsui Junkei|Tsuchi no Junkei]], a Sengoku daimyō (died [[:en:1584|1584]]). * [[:en:Kan'en|Kannen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1749|1749]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Ōta Nanpo|Ōta Nan-Ō]], a playwright (died [[:en:1823|1823]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiranui Kōuenemon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[:en:1879|1879]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsunomon Sansōko|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Hirata Tosuke|Hirata Tōsuke]], a bureaucrat and politician (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1851|1851]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Ogino Ginko|Ogino Ginko]], a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[:en:1913|1913]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugiura Shigetake|qq=|1=Sugiura Shigetake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1188462}}, a thinker and educator (died [[:en:1924|1924]]). * 安政6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Rimin|qq=|1=Yasui Harutami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450224}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Itaya Hazan|Itaya Hazan]], a ceramic artist (died [[:en:1963|1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 20th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobuhide|Oda Nobuhide]], a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1510|1510]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:April 27|April 27]]) – [[:en:Maeda Toshiie|Maeda Toshiie]], a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[:en:1538|1538]]). * 安政7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1860, [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]], Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1815|1815]]). * 慶応4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1868, [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Sagara Sōzō|Sagara Sōzō]], a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[:en:1839|1839]]).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Third Festival|Shōmiji]] and [[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hina Matsuri]] * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hama-ori|qq=|1=Hama-ori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11557526}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuantian Shangdi]]. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303|qq=}}

[[:en:Tsutsui Junkei|Tsuchi no Junkei]], a Sengoku daimyō (died [[:en:1584|1584]]). * [[:en:Kan'en|Kannen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1749|1749]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Ōta Nanpo|Ōta Nan-Ō]], a playwright (died [[:en:1823|1823]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiranui Kōuenemon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Hirata Tosuke|Hirata Tōsuke]], a bureaucrat and politician (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1851|1851]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Ogino Ginko|Ogino Ginko]], a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[:en:1913|1913]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – {{ill|Sugiura Rimin|ja|安井理民|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Rimin|qq=|1=Yasui Harutami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450224}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Itaya Hazan|Itaya Hazan]], a ceramic artist == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 20th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobuhide|Oda Nobuhide]], a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1510|1510]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:April 27|April 27]]) – [[:en:Maeda Toshiie|Maeda Toshiie]], a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[:en:1538|1538]]). * 安政7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1860, [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]], Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1815|1815]]). * 慶応4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1868, [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Sagara Sōzō|Sagara Sōzō]], a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[:en:1839|1839]]).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Third Festival|Shōmiji]] and [[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hina Matsuri]] * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hama-ori|qq=|1=Hama-ori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11557526}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuantian Shangdi]]. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.

== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) caused the fall of [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by capturing the castle at [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the [[:en:Sekihōtai|Akahōtai]], as pseudo-officials.

== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) caused the fall of [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by capturing the castle at [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian == Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) caused the fall of [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by capturing the castle at [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the [[:en:Sekihōtai|Akahōtai]], as pseudo-officials.

== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) caused the fall of [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by capturing the castle at [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the office of [[:en:Kanjō bugyō|Kanjō Bugyō]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the [[:en:Sekihōtai|Akahōtai]], as pseudo-officials.

== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Third Festival|Shōmiji]] and [[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hina Matsuri]] * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hama-ori|1=Hama-ori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11557526}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuantian Shangdi]]. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初七]][[zh:三月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839096]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 7|qq=March 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) caused the fall of [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by capturing the castle at [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle (Ise Province)]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the office of [[:en:Kanjō bugyō|Kanjō Bugyō]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, ending Japan’s national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including members of the [[:en:Sekihōtai|Akahōtai]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[:en:Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1288|1288]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Fushimi|Later Fushimi Tennō]], the 93rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1336|1336]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – [[:en:Tsutsui Junkei|Tsuchi no Junkei]], a Sengoku daimyō (died [[:en:1584|1584]]). * [[:en:Kan'en|Kannen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1749|1749]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Ōta Nanpo|Ōta Nan-Ō]], a playwright (died [[:en:1823|1823]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[:en:1879|1879]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsunomon Sansōko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Hirata Tosuke|Hirata Tōsuke]], a bureaucrat and politician (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1851|1851]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Ogino Ginko|Ogino Ginko]], a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[:en:1913|1913]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugiura Shigetake|1=Sugiura Shigetake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1188462}}, a thinker and educator (died [[:en:1924|1924]]). * 安政6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Rimin|1=Yasui Harutami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450224}}, founder of the first Sōbu Railway (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Itaya Hazan|Itaya Hazan]], a ceramic artist (died [[:en:1963|1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 20th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobuhide|Oda Nobuhide]], a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1510|1510]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:April 27|April 27]]) – [[:en:Maeda Toshiie|Maeda Toshiie]], a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[:en:1538|1538]]). * 安政7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1860, [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]], Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1815|1815]]). * 慶応4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1868, [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Sagara Sōzō|Sagara Sōzō]], a Sonnō jōi activist (born [[:en:1839|1839]]).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Third Festival|Shōmiji]] and [[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hina Matsuri]] * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hama-ori|1=Hama-ori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11557526}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuantian Shangdi]]. * A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in Zhuang language: samnyiedcosam) to honor their ancestors, accompanied by large-scale singing gatherings. * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
